notes:
For basic printing functionality use the HPIJS driver . For advanced functionality such as printer status and maintenance features, use the HPLIP driver (which includes HPIJS).

PCL 5e, out of the box, parallel and USB connection, 250-sheet tray built-in, extra 250-sheet tray available.

Inductive "Instant On" fuser for very fast pre-heating, first page after around 8 seconds.
